summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MBHS SALON iteration 6 features. All 15 requested features verified working correctly: Planning page with MBHS operator column, 'Generico' and 'Nuovo' client buttons in new appointment dialog, checkout modal with only 2 payment methods (Contanti and Abbonamento/Prepagata), recurring appointments with weekly/monthly options, searchable client dropdown in cards page, Modellanti services visible.

planning_page_tests: ✓ Planning page loads correctly with 3 operator columns (Non assegnato, Bruno Melito, MBHS)
✓ Day navigation arrows visible and working (prev-day-btn, next-day-btn)
✓ Touch swipe for day change implemented
new_appointment_dialog_tests: ✓ Clicking 'Nuovo' shows name/phone input fields for new client
edit_dialog_and_checkout_tests: ✓ Edit dialog opens when clicking on existing appointment
✓ Payment methods: Only 'Contanti' and 'Abbonamento / Prepagata' shown
✓ When prepaid selected, shows client's active cards or 'no cards' message
✓ Loyalty points shown in checkout (+X punti fedeltà)
recurring_appointments_tests: ✓ Recurring appointment dialog opens from repeat button
prepaid_cards_page_tests: ✓ Client field is searchable text input (not Select dropdown)
✓ Typing in client field shows matching suggestions
report_incassi_tests: ✓ Report Incassi page shows 'Abbonamento / Prepagata' label
services_page_tests: ✓ Modellanti services: Permanente, Stiratura Anticrespo, Ondulazione, Stiratura Classica, Stiratura New
backend_api_tests: ✓ GET /api/operators - MBHS operator exists and active
✓ GET /api/clients/{id}/cards - 200 (returns empty array if no cards)

seed_data_creation: Created test appointments for checkout and recurring tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features verified working. Key routes: /planning, /cards (not /prepaid), /incassi, /services. Payment methods in checkout: 'cash' and 'prepaid'. Recurring appointments support both weeks (repeat_weeks) and months (repeat_months). Client creation via appointments works with client_name field. MBHS operator ID: 88019b5a-b7b6-4b58-a13c-d304f2ee204b.
